title: cornus parvifolia
intro: Cornus parvifolia, also known as the Dwarf Cornel or Bunchberry, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Cornus parvifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and alleviate cold and flu symptoms.
